function getTransactionDescription(type: TransactionType): string {
  return TYPE_LABELS[type] || '';
}

function getCapitalizedText(text: string): string {
  if (!text) return text;
  return text.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + text.slice(1).toLowerCase();
}

function getTransactionCardItem(
  transaction: PointsTransaction,
): PropsCardTransition {
  const isPositive = transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED';
  const valueColor = isPositive ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02' : 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01';
  const isExpired = transaction.type === 'EXPIRED';

  return {
    type: 'default' as const,
    bgColor: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01' as const,
    titleColor: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01' as const,
    isSelected: true,
    leftIcon: isExpired ? 'icon-less' : (transaction.icon as PropsIconsNameCore),
    leftIconColor: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01',
    labelBgColor: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03',
    showBackgroundLeftIcon: true,
    title: getCapitalizedText(transaction.description),
    description: undefined,
    value: getFormattedPointsValue(transaction.amount, transaction.type),
    valueColor,
    descriptionSecondary: getTransactionDescription(transaction.type),
    descriptionSecondaryColor: 'INTENSE_COLOR_04',
    showIcon: true,
    rightIcon: 'icon-next',
    showRightIcon: !isExpired,
    onPressDetail: () => {
      eventSelectContent({
        content_type: 'cta',
        content_id: 'detalhe_ponto',
        location_1: 'monetizacao',
        location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
        location_3: 'extrato_hub_recompensas',
      });
    },
  };
}

interface GroupedTransactions {
  date: string;
  items: propsItemsListCardTransition[];
}

function getGroupedTransactionsByDate(
  transactions: PointsTransaction[],
): GroupedTransactions[] {
  if (transactions.length === 0) {
    return [];
  }

  const sortedTransactions = [...transactions].sort((a, b) =>
    moment(b.date).diff(moment(a.date)),
  );

  const groupedByDate = sortedTransactions.reduce((acc, transaction) => {
    const formattedDate = getFormattedDateForHeader(transaction.date);

    if (!acc[formattedDate]) {
      acc[formattedDate] = [];
    }

    acc[formattedDate].push(
      getTransactionCardItem(transaction) as propsItemsListCardTransition,
    );
    return acc;
  }, {} as Record<string, propsItemsListCardTransition[]>);

  const getSortedItemsByDate = (
    items: propsItemsListCardTransition[],
    date: string,
  ) => {
    return items.sort((a, b) => {
      const transactionA = sortedTransactions.find(
        (t) =>
          getFormattedDateForHeader(t.date) === date &&
          getTransactionCardItem(t).title === a.title,
      );
      const transactionB = sortedTransactions.find(
        (t) =>
          getFormattedDateForHeader(t.date) === date &&
          getTransactionCardItem(t).title === b.title,
      );

      if (transactionA && transactionB) {
        return moment(transactionB.date).diff(moment(transactionA.date));
      }
      return 0;
    });
  };

  const getSortedByDate = (a: GroupedTransactions, b: GroupedTransactions) => {
    const dateA = moment(a.date.split(' ').slice(1).join(' '), 'DD MMMM');
    const dateB = moment(b.date.split(' ').slice(1).join(' '), 'DD MMMM');
    return dateB.diff(dateA);
  };

  return Object.entries(groupedByDate)
    .map(([date, items]) => ({
      date,
      items: getSortedItemsByDate(items as propsItemsListCardTransition[], date),
    }))
    .sort(getSortedByDate);
}

class PointsDataGroupedByDayMapper {
  public static getMappedData(
    groupedData: Array<{
      date: string;
      items: propsItemsListCardTransition[];
    }>,
    showLabels = true,
  ): propsItemsListCardTransition[] {
    if (!groupedData || groupedData.length === 0) return [];

    return groupedData.flatMap(({ date: label, items }) =>
      (items ?? []).map((item, index) => ({
        ...item,
        label,
        showLabel: showLabels ? index === 0 : false,
      })),
    ) as propsItemsListCardTransition[];
  }
}

function getTransactionFromDto(dto: TransactionDto): PointsTransaction {
  return {
    id: dto.id,
    date: dto.date,
    description: dto.description,
    type: getMappedTransactionType(dto.type),
    amount: dto.amount,
    currencyValue: 0,
    icon: dto.icon,
    details: {
      provider: '',
      extraInfo: '',
      fields: [],
    },
    status: dto.status
  };
}

export function processPointsExtractData(
  extractData: PointsExtractData | null | undefined,
): ProcessedExtractData {
  if (!extractData || typeof extractData !== 'object') {
    return DEFAULT_PROCESSED_EXTRACT_DATA;
  }

  try {
    const transactions = extractData.transactions || [];
    const groupedTransactions = getGroupedTransactionsByDate(transactions);
    const mappedTransactions = PointsDataGroupedByDayMapper.getMappedData(groupedTransactions);

    return {
      groupedTransactions,
      mappedTransactions,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    console.warn('Erro ao processar dados do extrato:', error);
    return DEFAULT_PROCESSED_EXTRACT_DATA;
  }
}

export function getPointsExtractFromResponse(
  response: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getPointsExtractApi>>,
): PointsExtractData | null {
  const apiResponse = response?.data;

  if (!apiResponse) {
    return null;
  }

  const status = apiResponse.status ?? (apiResponse as any).data?.status;

  const transactionsContainer = apiResponse.data ?? apiResponse;
  const transactionsDto = transactionsContainer?.transactions;
  const pagination = apiResponse.pagination ?? (apiResponse as any).data?.pagination;

  if (!transactionsDto || !Array.isArray(transactionsDto)) {
    return null;
  } 

  if (!pagination) {
    return null;
  }

  const transactions = transactionsDto.map(getTransactionFromDto);

  return {
    transactions,
    pagination,
  };
}

import {
  PointsExtractStatus,
  PointsBalanceStatus,
  type PointsExtractState,
  type PointsBalanceState,
  type PointsExtractFiltersState,
  type PointsExtractData,
  type ProcessedExtractData,
  type AppliedFilters,
} from '../models';

export interface PointsExtractActions {
  setExtractStatus: () => void;
  setExtractData: () => void;
  appendExtractData: () => void;
  setLoadingMore: () => void;
  setBalanceStatus: () => void;
  setBalance: () => void;
  setTransactionsFilters: () => void;
  clearTransactionsFilters: () => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

export interface PointsExtractSlice {
  pointsExtract: PointsExtractState;
  pointsBalance: PointsBalanceState;
  pointsExtractFilters: PointsExtractFiltersState;
  pointsExtractActions: PointsExtractActions;
}

const INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_STATE: PointsExtractState = {
  extractData: undefined,
  processedExtractData: undefined,
  status: PointsExtractStatus.IDLE,
  isLoadingMore: false,
  error: undefined,
};

const INITIAL_POINTS_BALANCE_STATE: PointsBalanceState = {
  points: undefined,
  status: PointsBalanceStatus.IDLE,
  error: undefined,
};

const INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_FILTERS_STATE: PointsExtractFiltersState = {
  appliedTransactionsFilters: undefined,
};

export const createPointsExtractSlice: StateCreator<
  PointsExtractSlice,
  [],
  [],
  PointsExtractSlice
> = (set) => ({
  pointsExtract: INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_STATE,
  pointsBalance: INITIAL_POINTS_BALANCE_STATE,
  pointsExtractFilters: INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_FILTERS_STATE,
  pointsExtractActions: {
    setExtractStatus: (status) =>
      set((state) => ({
        pointsExtract: { 
          ...state.pointsExtract, 
          status,
          ...(status === PointsExtractStatus.IDLE || status === PointsExtractStatus.LOADING ? { error: undefined } : {}),
        },
      })),
    setExtractData: (extractData, processedExtractData) =>
      set((state) => ({
        pointsExtract: {
          ...state.pointsExtract,
          extractData,
          processedExtractData,
          status: PointsExtractStatus.SUCCESS,
          isLoadingMore: false,
          error: undefined,
        },
      })),
    appendExtractData: (extractData, processedExtractData) =>
      set((state) => {
        const existingTransactions = state.pointsExtract.extractData?.transactions ?? [];
        const newTransactions = extractData.transactions;
        const mergedTransactions = [...existingTransactions, ...newTransactions];

        const existingProcessed = state.pointsExtract.processedExtractData;
        const newProcessed = processedExtractData;

        let mergedProcessed: ProcessedExtractData | undefined;
        if (existingProcessed && newProcessed) {
          const existingMapped = existingProcessed.mappedTransactions ?? [];
          const newMapped = newProcessed.mappedTransactions ?? [];
          mergedProcessed = {
            groupedTransactions: newProcessed.groupedTransactions,
            mappedTransactions: [...existingMapped, ...newMapped],
          };
        } else {
          mergedProcessed = newProcessed ?? existingProcessed;
        }

        return {
          pointsExtract: {
            ...state.pointsExtract,
            extractData: {
              transactions: mergedTransactions,
              pagination: extractData.pagination,
            },
            processedExtractData: mergedProcessed,
            isLoadingMore: false,
          },
        };
      }),
    setLoadingMore: (isLoading) =>
      set((state) => ({
        pointsExtract: { ...state.pointsExtract, isLoadingMore: isLoading },
      })),
    setBalanceStatus: (status) =>
      set((state) => ({
        pointsBalance: { ...state.pointsBalance, status },
      })),
    setBalance: (points) =>
      set((state) => ({
        pointsBalance: {
          ...state.pointsBalance,
          points,
          status: PointsBalanceStatus.SUCCESS,
          error: undefined,
        },
      })),
    setTransactionsFilters: (filters) =>
      set((state) => ({
        pointsExtractFilters: {
          ...state.pointsExtractFilters,
          appliedTransactionsFilters: filters,
        },
      })),
    clearTransactionsFilters: () =>
      set((state) => ({
        pointsExtractFilters: {
          ...state.pointsExtractFilters,
          appliedTransactionsFilters: undefined,
        },
      })),
    reset: () =>
      set({
        pointsExtract: INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_STATE,
        pointsBalance: INITIAL_POINTS_BALANCE_STATE,
        pointsExtractFilters: INITIAL_POINTS_EXTRACT_FILTERS_STATE,
      }),
  },
});

import { NativeStackNavigationProp } from '@react-navigation/native-stack';
import {
  BackDropBottom,
  Box,
  Button,
  CardActivity,
  Icon,
  PropsTokenColorsCore,
  SeparatorHorizontal,
  Text,
  TouchBox,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
import theme from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/theme';
import { PropsRootStack } from '@semparar/mf-app-fintech-card-place/src/routes/Models';
import React, { FC } from 'react';
import { Dimensions, Linking } from 'react-native';
import { useSafeAreaInsets } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';

import { BenefitBackDropProps } from './Models';

export const BenefitBackDrop: FC<BenefitBackDropProps> = ({ benefitDetailData, modalizeRef }) => {
  const navigation = useNavigation<NativeStackNavigationProp<PropsRootStack, 'FintechBenefits'>>();
  const handleCloseModal = () => {
    if (modalizeRef.current?.close) {
      modalizeRef.current?.close();
    }
  };

  const handleCloseIsurance = () => {
    if (benefitDetailData?.idScreenRef?.text) {
      navigation.navigate(benefitDetailData?.idScreenRef?.text);
    }
    handleCloseModal();
  };

  const handleActivityClick = (link: string | undefined): void => {
    link && Linking.openURL(link);
  };

  const handleMonthlyFeeExemption = () => {
    handleCloseModal();
    navigation.navigate('FaqExemptionEligibility');
  };

  const handleCashback = () => {
    handleCloseModal();
    navigation.navigate('Cashback');
  };

  const renderButton = () => {
    switch (benefitDetailData?.idType?.text) {
      case 'card_insurance_auto':
        if (benefitDetailData?.idButtonText?.text) {
          return (
            <Button
              onPress={handleCloseIsurance}
              mt="xxs"
              text={benefitDetailData?.idButtonText?.text}
              type="secundaryMedium"
            />
          );
        }
        return null;
      case 'card_insurance':
        return (
          <Button
            testID="btnBenefitBackDropInsurance"
            onPress={handleCloseIsurance}
            mt="xxs"
            text={benefitDetailData?.idButtonTextInsurance?.text}
            type="primaryLarge"
          />
        );
      default:
        if (benefitDetailData?.idType?.id === 'ID_TYPE_MONTHLY_FEE_EXEMPTION') {
          return (
            <Button
              onPress={handleMonthlyFeeExemption}
              mt="xxs"
              text={benefitDetailData?.idButtonText?.text}
              type="secundaryLarge"
            />
          );
        }

        if (benefitDetailData?.idType?.id === 'ID_TYPE_CASHBACK_ABASTECIMENTO') {
          return (
            <Button
              testID="btnBenefitBackDropInsurance"
              onPress={handleCashback}
              mt="xxs"
              text={benefitDetailData?.idButtonText?.text}
              type="secundaryLarge"
            />
          );
        }

        return null;
    }
  };

  return (
    <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}>
      <Box width="100%" justify="flex-end" mt="xs" direction position="absolute">
        <Icon color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" name="icon-close" size="xs" onPress={handleCloseModal} />
      </Box>

      <Box
        mt="meddium"
        bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_03"
        width="56px"
        height="56px"
        br="medium"
        justify="center"
        align="center"
      >
        <Icon
          color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
          name={benefitDetailData?.idIcone?.text}
          size="xs"
          bgColor="EMPHASIS_COLOR_03"
        />
      </Box>
      <Text color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mt="xxs" type="subtitleLG">
        {benefitDetailData?.idFullTitle?.text}
      </Text>
      <Text color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt="xxs" type="paragraphLG">
        {benefitDetailData?.idFullText?.text}
      </Text>

      {!!benefitDetailData?.idLinkRef?.text && benefitDetailData?.idLink?.text && (
        <TouchBox onPress={() => Linking.openURL(benefitDetailData?.idLinkRef?.text as string)}>
          <Text
            type="paragraphLarger"
            mt="xxs"
            underline={benefitDetailData?.idType?.id !== 'ID_TYPE_SALA_VIP'}
            color={theme.colors.EMPHASIS_COLOR_01 as PropsTokenColorsCore}
          >
            {benefitDetailData?.idLink?.text}
          </Text>
        </TouchBox>
      )}

      {renderButton()}

      {benefitDetailData?.idType?.text === 'card_insurance_auto' && (
        <>
          <SeparatorHorizontal
            mt="xxs"
            borderWidth="smaller"
            borderColor="LIGHT_BASE_03"
            height={1}
            width="100%"
          />
          <Text color="BRAND_BASE_01" mt="xxs" type="paragraphXL">
            {benefitDetailData?.idParagraphTitle?.text}
          </Text>

          <CardActivity
            onPress={() => {
              handleActivityClick(benefitDetailData?.idPhoneAction?.text);
            }}
            icon={benefitDetailData?.idPhoneIcon?.text}
            mt="xxs"
            showIcon
            iconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
            title={benefitDetailData?.idPhoneTitle?.text}
            description={benefitDetailData?.idPhoneSubtitle?.text}
          />

          {benefitDetailData?.idOnlineAction?.text && (
            <CardActivity
              onPress={() => {
                handleActivityClick(benefitDetailData?.idOnlineAction?.text);
              }}
              icon={benefitDetailData?.idOnlineIcon?.text}
              iconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="xxs"
              showIcon
              title={benefitDetailData?.idOnlineTitle?.text}
              description={benefitDetailData?.idOnlineSubtitle?.text}
            />
          )}
        </>
      )}
    </BackDropBottom>
  );
};

import { BenefitBackDropProps } from './Models';

export const BenefitBackDrop: FC<BenefitBackDropProps> = ({ benefitDetailData, modalizeRef }) => {
  const navigation = useNavigation<NativeStackNavigationProp<PropsRootStack, 'FintechBenefits'>>();

    handleCloseModal();
    navigation.navigate('Cashback');
  };

  const renderButton = () => {
    switch (benefitDetailData?.idType?.text) {
      case 'card_insurance_auto':
        if (benefitDetailData?.idButtonText?.text) {
          return (
            <Button
              onPress={handleCloseIsurance}
              mt="xxs"
              text={benefitDetailData?.idButtonText?.text}
              type="secundaryMedium"
            />

        }
        return null;

            testID="btnBenefitBackDropInsurance"
            onPress={handleCloseIsurance}
            mt="xxs"
            text={benefitDetailData?.idButtonTextInsurance?.text}
            type="primaryLarge"
          />
        );
      default:
        if (benefitDetailData?.idType?.id === 'ID_TYPE_MONTHLY_FEE_EXEMPTION') {
          return (
            <Button
              onPress={handleMonthlyFeeExemption}
              mt="xxs"
              text={benefitDetailData?.idButtonText?.text}
              type="secundaryLarge"
            />
          );
        }

        if (benefitDetailData?.idType?.id === 'ID_TYPE_CASHBACK_ABASTECIMENTO') {
          return (
            <Button
              testID="btnBenefitBackDropInsurance"
              onPress={handleCashback}
              mt="xxs"
              text={benefitDetailData?.idButtonText?.text}
              type="secundaryLarge"
            />
          );
        }

        return null;
    }
  };

  return (
    <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}>
      <Box width="100%" justify="flex-end" mt="xs" direction position="absolute">
        <Icon color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" name="icon-close" size="xs" onPress={handleCloseModal} />
      </Box>

      <Box
        mt="meddium"
        bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_03"
        width="56px"
        height="56px"
        br="medium"
        justify="center"
        align="center"
      >
        <Icon
          color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
          name={benefitDetailData?.idIcone?.text}
          size="xs"
          bgColor="EMPHASIS_COLOR_03"
        />
      </Box>
      <Text color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mt="xxs" type="subtitleLG">
        {benefitDetailData?.idFullTitle?.text}
      </Text>
      <Text color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt="xxs" type="paragraphLG">
        {benefitDetailData?.idFullText?.text}
      </Text>

      {!!benefitDetailData?.idLinkRef?.text && benefitDetailData?.idLink?.text && (
        <TouchBox onPress={() => Linking.openURL(benefitDetailData?.idLinkRef?.text as string)}>
          <Text
            type="paragraphLarger"
            mt="xxs"
            underline={benefitDetailData?.idType?.id !== 'ID_TYPE_SALA_VIP'}
            color={theme.colors.EMPHASIS_COLOR_01 as PropsTokenColorsCore}
          >
            {benefitDetailData?.idLink?.text}
          </Text>
        </TouchBox>
      )}

      {renderButton()}

      {benefitDetailData?.idType?.text === 'card_insurance_auto' && (
        <>
          <SeparatorHorizontal
            mt="xxs"
            borderWidth="smaller"
            borderColor="LIGHT_BASE_03"
            height={1}
            width="100%"
          />
          <Text color="BRAND_BASE_01" mt="xxs" type="paragraphXL">
            {benefitDetailData?.idParagraphTitle?.text}
          </Text>

          <CardActivity
            onPress={() => {
              handleActivityClick(benefitDetailData?.idPhoneAction?.text);
            }}
            icon={benefitDetailData?.idPhoneIcon?.text}
            mt="xxs"
            showIcon
            iconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
            title={benefitDetailData?.idPhoneTitle?.text}
            description={benefitDetailData?.idPhoneSubtitle?.text}
          />

          {benefitDetailData?.idOnlineAction?.text && (
            <CardActivity
              onPress={() => {
                handleActivityClick(benefitDetailData?.idOnlineAction?.text);
              }}
              icon={benefitDetailData?.idOnlineIcon?.text}
              iconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
              mt="xxs"
              showIcon
              title={benefitDetailData?.idOnlineTitle?.text}
              description={benefitDetailData?.idOnlineSubtitle?.text}
            />
          )}
        </>
      )}
    </BackDropBottom>
  );
};

import { PropsStatusValues } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/atomic/fintech/StatusValues/Models';

import { ProductsReducerProps } from '../../../../redux/ducks/customers/products';
import {
  InvoicesFintechProps,
  InvoiceStatusTypes,
} from '../../../../redux/ducks/invoices';
import { AppReducers } from '../../../../redux/reducers/Models';

export interface InvoiceStatusObject
  extends Pick<
    PropsStatusValues,
    'title' | 'iconTitle' | 'iconTitleColor' | 'titleColor'
  > {
  hasPaymentBtn?: boolean;
  hasPaymentOptionBtn?: boolean;
  hasInstallmentBtn?: boolean;
  tooltipDistance?: string;
  typeTag?: 'error' | 'warning' | 'neutral' | 'success';
  highlightTag?: boolean;
}
export interface InvoiceStatusProps {
  type: InvoiceStatusTypes;
  productsReducer: ProductsReducerProps['data'][0];
  carrouselItems: PropsQuickAccessSmall[];
  invoiceData: InvoicesFintechProps['data'][0];
  isAutoDebt: boolean;
  cashback: number;
  keyTab: number;
  showTolltip: boolean;
  setShowTolltip: (show: boolean) => void;
  loadingCashback: boolean;
  loadingInvoice: boolean;
  loadingProducts: boolean;
  setShowValue?: (show: boolean) => void;
  showValue?: boolean;
  featuresReducer?: AppReducers['featuresReducer'];
}

export interface InvoiceStatusViewProps {
  invoiceStatusObject: InvoiceStatusObject;
  showValue?: boolean;
  productsReducerIsLoading: boolean;
  setShowValue?: (show: boolean) => void;
  productsReducer: ProductsReducerProps['data'][0];
  carrouselItems: PropsQuickAccessSmall[];
  invoiceData: InvoicesFintechProps['data'][0];
  keyTab: number;
  cashback: number;
  handleNavigateToCashback: () => void;
  showTolltip: boolean;
  invoiceType: InvoiceStatusTypes;
  setShowTolltip: (show: boolean) => void;
  isAutoDebt: boolean;
  loadingProducts: boolean;
  loadingCashback: boolean;
}

export type InvoiceStatusData = Record<InvoiceStatusTypes, InvoiceStatusObject>;

import {
  Box,
  Button,
  LimitCard,
  QuickAccess,
  SeparatorHorizontal,
  StatusValues,
  Text,
  TextIcon,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import React from 'react';
import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
import { moment } from '../../../services/moment';
import {
  formatToCurrency,
  transformInvoiceToPattern,
} from '../../../utils/functions';
import { InvoiceStatusViewProps } from './Models';
import { Container } from './styles';
import { TextIconRewardProgram } from '../../molecules/TextIconRewardProgram';

export const InvoiceStatusView = ({
  invoiceStatusObject,
  showValue,
  productsReducer,
  carrouselItems,
  invoiceData,
  invoiceType,
  isAutoDebt,
  loadingProducts,
}: InvoiceStatusViewProps) => {
  const navigation = useNavigation();
  return (
    <Container>
      <StatusValues
        highlightTag
        hasButtonSecundarySmall={invoiceStatusObject?.hasPaymentBtn}
        textButtonSecondarySmall="Exibir fatura"
        {...invoiceStatusObject}
        onPressSecundarySmall={() => {
          eventSelectContent({
            content_type: 'cta',
            content_id: 'ver_fatura',
            location_1: 'autosservico',
            location_2: 'spmais',
            location_3: 'home_spmais',
          });
          navigation.navigate('InvoiceCard', {
            dueDate: invoiceData.Vencimento,
            date: moment().toISOString(),
            analytics: {
              screen_name: 'spmais',
              screen_class: 'home_spmais',
              screen_bussines: 'autosservico',
              screen_info: {
                location_1: 'autosservico',
                location_2: 'spmais',
                location_3: 'home_spmais',
              },
            },
          });
        }}
        value={formatToCurrency(invoiceData.Valor)}
        showValue={showValue}
        valueColor="INTENSE_COLOR_01"
        colorDotIcon="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
        colorDate="INTENSE_COLOR_01"
      />
      <Box width="100%" direction align="center" mt="quark">
        <Text
          testID="textInvoiceType"
          maxWidth="100%"
          maxFontSizeMultiplier={1.6}
          numberOfLines={1}
          type="paragraphMD"
          color="INTENSE_COLOR_02"
        >
          {invoiceType === 'default' ? 'Fechamento ' : 'Vencimento '}
          {moment(
            invoiceType === 'default'
              ? invoiceData.DataDeCorte
              : invoiceData.VencimentoOriginal,
          ).format('DD/MM')}
        </Text>
      </Box>
      {(invoiceStatusObject?.hasInstallmentBtn ||
        invoiceStatusObject?.hasPaymentOptionBtn) && (
        <Box direction justify="space-between" mt="xxxs">
          <Box width="100%">
            <Button
              testID="btnInvoiceStatusPayInvoice"
              type="primaryLarge"
              text="Pagar fatura"
              onPress={() => {
                eventSelectContent({
                  content_type: 'cta',
                  content_id: 'pagar_fatura',
                  location_1: 'autosservico',
                  location_2: 'spmais',
                  location_3: 'home_spmais',
                });
                navigation.navigate('PayInvoice', {
                  payment: transformInvoiceToPattern(invoiceData),
                  analytics: {
                    screen_name: 'spmais',
                    screen_class: 'home_spmais',
                    screen_bussines: 'autosservico',
                    screen_info: {
                      location_1: 'autosservico',
                      location_2: 'spmais',
                      location_3: 'home_spmais',
                    },
                  },
                });
              }}
            />
          </Box>
        </Box>
      )}

      <LimitCard
        limitTotal={productsReducer?.Limite}
        limitUsed={productsReducer?.Limite - productsReducer?.LimiteDisponivel}
        textLimitUsed="Limite utilizado"
        textLimitValue="Disponível"
        mt="xs"
        hideBgColor
        showLimitAvailable={showValue}
        showLimitUse={showValue}
        hidePadding
        bgBarColor="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
        isLoading={loadingProducts}
      />

      {invoiceData.MelhorDiaCompra ? (
        <Box width="100%" direction align="center" mt="xxs">
          <Text
            testID="textInvoiceStatusBestDayToBuy"
            maxWidth="100%"
            maxFontSizeMultiplier={1.6}
            numberOfLines={1}
            type="paragraphMD"
            color="INTENSE_COLOR_02"
          >
            Melhor dia de compra:{' '}
            {moment(invoiceData.MelhorDiaCompra).format('DD/MM')}
          </Text>
        </Box>
      ) : null}

      <SeparatorHorizontal bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_05" height={1} mt="xs" />
      <TextIconRewardProgram showValue={showValue} />
      {isAutoDebt && (
        <TextIcon
          mt="xxs"
          type="price"
          description="Débito em conta ativo"
          iconName="icon-debit-account"
          iconSize="sm"
          bgIconColor="transparent"
          testID="textInvoiceStatusAutoDebt"
          iconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
          textColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
          priceValueColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
          bulletColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
        />
      )}
      <QuickAccess type="magenta" data={carrouselItems} mt="xs" themes="dark" />
    </Container>
  );
};

import { BenefitImages, Benefits } from '../screens/Benefits/Models';

import { useCachedImage } from '@semparar/mf-app-fintech-onboarding/src/hooks/useCachedImage';
import { useAppSelector } from './useAppSelector';
import { HandleCheckExemptionEligibilityProps } from './useProductAndContentQuery/Models';

const defaultValues = {
  nome: '',
  corPlano: '',
  imagens: {} as Partial<BenefitImages>,
  benefits: {} as Benefits,
  cardMask: '•••• •••• ••••',
  cardRegexReplace: '$1 $2 $3 $4',
  cardRegex: '/(\\d{4})(\\d{4})(\\d{4})(\\d{4})/',
  carousel: [] as propsData[],
  modality: '',
  highlightColorBenefitModality: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
  highlightColorBenefitBox: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02',
  highlightColorBenefitText: 'BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01',
};

const useContents = (
  handleCheckExemptionEligibility?: HandleCheckExemptionEligibilityProps,
) => {
  const contents = useAppSelector(rootState => {
    const {
      productsReducer,
      contentsReducer,
      exemptionEligibilityReducer,
      featuresReducer,
    } = rootState;

    const { data: contentsReducerData } = contentsReducer;

    const currentContent = (() => {
      const firstProduct = productsReducer.data[0];
      if (!firstProduct) return null;
      const firstProductLogoNumber = Number(firstProduct.Logo);
      return contentsReducerData.find(
        content => firstProductLogoNumber === Number(content.codPlano),
      );
    })();

    if (!currentContent) return defaultValues;

    const {
      benefits,
      nome,
      corPlano,
      imagens,
      cardMask,
      cardRegex,
      cardRegexReplace,
      highlightColorBenefitBox,
      highlightColorBenefitModality,
      highlightColorBenefitText,
      modality,
    } = currentContent;

    const { hasExemptionEligible } = handleCheckExemptionEligibility?.({
      contentsReducer,
      productsReducer,
      exemptionEligibilityReducer,
      featuresReducer,
    }) ?? {
      hasExemptionEligible: false,
      hasProductsDataAccount: false,
    };

    const filteredBenefits = (() => {
      if (hasExemptionEligible) return benefits;
      const { MONTHLY_FEE_EXEMPTION: _, ...filtered } = benefits;
      return filtered;
    })();

    return {
      benefits: filteredBenefits,
      nome,
      corPlano,
      imagens,
      cardMask,
      cardRegex,
      cardRegexReplace,
      highlightColorBenefitBox,
      highlightColorBenefitModality,
      highlightColorBenefitText,
      modality,
    };
  });

  useCachedImage({
    cacheKey: '@SemPararCachedImage',
    options: {
      preLoadAllImages: true,
    },
  });

  return contents;
};

export default useContents;

interface UsePreventDoubleClickOptions {
  delay?: number;
  onDoubleClickAttempt?: () => void;
}

interface UsePreventDoubleClickReturn<T extends object[]> {
  executeWithPreventDoubleClick: (..._args: T) => Promise<void>;
  isProcessing: boolean;
  reset: () => void;
}

export function usePreventDoubleClick<T extends object[]>(
  callback: (..._args: T) => Promise<void> | void,
  options: UsePreventDoubleClickOptions = {},
): UsePreventDoubleClickReturn<T> {
  const { delay = 1000, onDoubleClickAttempt } = options;

  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
  const timeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  const lastExecutionRef = useRef<number>(0);

  const executeWithPreventDoubleClick = useCallback(
    async (...args: T) => {
      const now = Date.now();

      if (now - lastExecutionRef.current < delay || isProcessing) {
        onDoubleClickAttempt?.();
        return;
      }

      try {
        setIsProcessing(true);
        lastExecutionRef.current = now;

        await callback(...args);
      } finally {
        if (timeoutRef.current) {
          clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);
        }

        timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
          setIsProcessing(false);
        }, delay);
      }
    },
    [callback, delay, onDoubleClickAttempt, isProcessing],
  );

  const reset = useCallback(() => {
    setIsProcessing(false);
    lastExecutionRef.current = 0;
    if (timeoutRef.current) {
      clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);
      timeoutRef.current = null;
    }
  }, []);

  return {
    executeWithPreventDoubleClick,
    isProcessing,
    reset,
  };
}

"}]},"uuid":"bedcaa20-f1da-4ec6-b0c4-0072dbc7f2d9","timestamp":"2026-01-25T02:18:15.517Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/hooks/useShareMedia.ts","content":"import { useCallback, useState } from 'react';
import { Platform, Share as RNShare } from 'react-native';
import RNFS from 'react-native-fs';
import Share from 'react-native-share';
import { useDispatch } from 'react-redux';

import {
  DownloadInvoiceActions,
  DownloadInvoiceTypes,
} from '../redux/ducks/downloadInvoice';

export interface UseShareMediaReturn {
  handleShare: (_date: string) => Promise<void>;
  isLoading: boolean;
  isError: boolean;
}

export type FileType = 'pdf' | 'png' | 'jpg' | 'jpeg';

const urlEncoderType: Record<FileType, string> = {
  pdf: 'application/pdf',
  jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
  jpg: 'image/jpg',
  png: 'image/png',
};

export const useShareMedia = ({
  fileName,
  fileType,
}: {
  fileName: string;
  fileType: FileType;
}): UseShareMediaReturn => {
  const [isError, setIsError] = useState(false);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);

  const dispatch = useDispatch();

  const invoiceDownloadRequest = useCallback<
    DownloadInvoiceActions['downloadInvoiceRequest']
  >(
    (cpf, date, callBack, openFile) =>
      dispatch({
        type: DownloadInvoiceTypes.REQUEST,
        cpf,
        date,
        callBack,
        openFile,
      }),
    [],
  );

  const handleShare = async (date: string) => {
    setIsLoading(true);

    try {
      const path = `${RNFS.DocumentDirectoryPath}/${fileName}.${fileType}`;

      const content = {
        title: fileName,
        message: fileName,
      };

      invoiceDownloadRequest(
        '',
        date,
        async ({ base64 }) => {
          await RNFS.writeFile(path, base64, 'base64').catch(error => {
            throw new Error(`WriteFile error: ${error}`);
          });

          if (Platform.OS === 'android') {
            await Share.open({
              ...content,
              url: `data:${urlEncoderType[fileType]};base64,${base64}`,
            });
          }
          await RNShare.share({
            ...content,
            url: encodeURIComponent(path),
          });
        },
        false,
      );

      setIsError(false);
    } catch (err) {
      if (err instanceof Error && err.message === 'User did not share') {
        setIsError(false);
        return;
      }

      setIsError(true);
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return { handleShare, isLoading, isError };
};
